data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility'. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as customer bookings and queue entries, but fails to address the specific need for retry-safe ingestion, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
